phase-summary.outcome: Internal quote workflow, dashboard UX, scorecard, liabilities, and asset-growth guidance are documented and surfaced in the admin portal. `/ops` shows KPI cards and CRM sync banner above the command center; the command center now uses one left rail that combines section switching with inline detail content, while all live tab content stays in the right column. Admins get sidebar links to both `/ops` and customer `/dashboard` preview; optional `PORTAL_ADMIN_ONLY=true` restricts portal routes to admin users. Liabilities and scorecard rows are Payload collections (`ops-liability-items`, `ops-scorecard-rows`, migration 20260325_005955_ops_liabilities_and_scorecard_rows) merged with code defaults, seeded into real records, and used by the live dashboard; manual scorecard values now drive KPI cards where applicable. The day board reads scheduled jobs from Payload service appointments and HubSpot-backed tasks by day resolves owner IDs to display names where the token allows; open-deal pipeline still feeds projected revenue when HubSpot is active (D-crm-003). Internal ops targets global adds KPI tooltips, scorecard tooltip rows, and optional chart pipeline note. The public instant quote engine reads draftable/publishable `quoteSettings`; the portal links admins to Quotes and Quote settings.

file.description: Customer dashboard route; admins see same view with optional preview banner (no forced redirect to `/ops`).
Internal admin ops dashboard route with runtime CRM provider state.
Portal sidebar shortcuts for admin quote tools and docs.
Admin-only runtime toggle for switching the active CRM provider.
Left-rail command-center navigator with inline detail panel for daily ops, scorecard, milestones, and assets.
Calendar-based day board with scheduled jobs and optional HubSpot tasks.
Admin-gated Payload service-appointment feed for the ops calendar.
Responsive chart controls that no longer overlap dashboard content.
Admin-facing config for growth and system context.
Dashboard-specific operator board and trend data.
Draftable quote-settings global for instant quote math and service toggles.
Server mapper for published and draft quote settings.

next.action: Wire real revenue/MRR/pipeline series into the chart when accounting or CRM data is ready (task 06-03). Optional: in-portal CRUD APIs under `src/app/api/internal/ops/` if staff need editing without opening Payload admin.
